text: This chapter may be known and cited as the “Florida Uniform Disposition of Traffic Infractions Act.”

### Chapter 318. Disposition of Traffic Infractions
##### § 318.11 — Short title

This chapter may be known and cited as the “Florida Uniform Disposition of Traffic Infractions Act.”

subsections.text: This chapter may be known and cited as the “Florida Uniform Disposition of Traffic Infractions Act.”
